About Me
Final-Year Computer Engineering Student

I am a passionate final-year Computer Engineering student focused on building data-driven systems and solving real-world problems using technology.

I have hands-on experience in Python, SQL, Power BI, and full-stack web development using Flask and JavaScript.

I enjoy projects combining data analytics and application development — dashboards, real-time systems, and secure web apps. I also love graphic design and creating compelling visual content with Canva.
